title: Lindt Letterbox Chocolate Hamper - 360g (19-Piece Set) - Assorted Chocolate Bars Truffles & Wafers, Lindor Chocolates Gift Box, Birthday Gifts for Women and Men, Thank You or Christmas Gifts
features: WHAT'S INSIDE: A 360g letterbox chocolate gift featuring 19 premium Lindt chocolates: Milk, White, Salted Caramel, Pistachio, Hazelnut, Extra Dark 70% Truffles, plus Milk Chocolate Tablet and Choco Wafers
CONVENIENT & THOUGHTFUL: This compact chocolates gift box is small enough to fit through standard letterboxes, making it an easy and delightful treat to surprise someone
PREMIUM CHOCOLATE HAMPER: Enjoy a premium mix of silky truffles and crisp wafers. Ideal for birthdays, thank you gifts, or simply to brighten someone’s day
PERFECT GIFT FOR HER OR HIM: This Lindt chocolates selection box makes an elegant chocolate gift for women, men, friends, or colleagues. A small but elegant gesture for any occasion

THE LINDT STORY: Since 1845, Lindt’s Master Chocolatiers have created exquisite chocolates using the world’s finest cocoa and ingredients. Every Lindor chocolate truffle represents a moment of bliss and craftsmanship. Lindt chocolates are known globally for their smooth texture, elegant taste, and iconic Swiss quality
description: Product description "Send sweet surprises with the Lindt Lindor Letterbox Gift Hamper, a 360g assortment that fits perfectly through UK letterboxes for effortless gifting. Inside, enjoy 19 premium chocolates including Milk, White, Salted Caramel, Pistachio, Hazelnut, and Extra Dark Truffles, plus a Milk Chocolate Tablet and Choco Wafers. This convenient letterbox chocolates gift box combines indulgence and practicality—no need to wait for delivery. Perfect for birthdays, thank you gifts, or “just because” surprises for loved ones. Each Lindor truffle melts into smooth, rich perfection, showcasing Lindt’s luxury chocolates and premium ingredients. Whether for women, men, or colleagues, it’s a small but thoughtful chocolate hamper that delivers big smiles. Since 1845, Lindt’s Master Chocolatiers have crafted chocolates with passion and precision. This letterbox chocolate gift captures the essence of Swiss luxury and makes gifting beautifully simple." Ingredients Sugar, vegetable fat (coconut, palm kernel), cocoa butter, cocoa mass, whole MILK powder, LACTOSE, skimmed MILK powder, anhydrous MILK fat, emulsifier (SOYA lecithin), BARLEY malt extract, artificial flavourings (vanillin, caramel), cocoa mass, cocoa powder, low-fat cocoa, HAZELNUTS, PISTACHIO paste, CARAMEL, cream powder, glucose syrup, wheat flour, raising agents (sodium carbonates), natural flavourings, SESAME, ALMONDS
